mentions.note: Pure speculation after 360% rally from $0.22 lows; converts coal plants to natural gas for AI data centers; high debt, losses, unproven execution; wait for pullback before buying.
160-year-old power equipment maker resurgent with data center boom; 44% revenue growth, $2.7B backlog, 2000% booking growth YoY; can deliver in under 36 months vs 5-10 for turbines.
